# Sharawra Formation

**Summary**: A Silurian formation consisting primarily of sandstone and siltstone.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] studied the Sharawra Formation to understand its petrography and geochemistry.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The formation contains four members (Jarish, Khanafriyah, Nayyal, Zubliyat) with varying porosity and permeability. ([[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016, p. 1]])

## Conflicting Interpretations Across Sources

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] cementation, compaction, authigenic clay growth
